title: pilosella onegensis subsp. amauroderma
intro: Pilosella onegensis subsp. amauroderma, also known as a subspecies of the genus Pilosella, is a flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is native to the European mountain regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of Pilosella onegensis subsp. amauroderma include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and protect against oxidative stress, which can help in the management of various health conditions. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
